title: View Descriptor Protocol (VDP) v0.1
description: Schema for VDP view descriptor documents. Validates standalone ViewDescriptor and MultiViewDescriptor payloads. Definitions in $defs can be referenced by other schemas for inline body transport (_view / _views). The discovery document served at /.well-known/vdp has its own schema: vdp-discovery.v0-1.schema.json.

ViewDescriptor.description: A view descriptor identifying a root template URL and its dynamic slot assignments. Slots are recursive — each slot value is itself a ViewDescriptor or an array of ViewDescriptors.

TemplateURL.description: A URL identifying a template resource. MUST use HTTPS (loopback addresses excepted for local development).

Slots.description: A map of slot names to slot values. Each key is a named insertion point in the parent template. Each value is a ViewDescriptor (single template) or an array of ViewDescriptors (multiple templates rendered in sequence).

SlotValue.description: A single ViewDescriptor or an ordered array of ViewDescriptors. Arrays are rendered in sequence within the slot.

MultiViewDescriptor.description: Multiple named view descriptors for a single API response. Clients SHOULD use the 'default' view when no specific view is requested.

views.description: A map of view names to ViewDescriptors.
